focus: Complete backend — auth, boards, scoped endpoints
summary: Built entire backend: users/boards tables, JWT auth (register/login/me), auth middleware, board CRUD with column seeding, scoped column/card endpoints with board ownership verification. 31 tests pass, types clean.

focus: Frontend — auth UI, board list, scoped board view (AC10-AC13)
summary: Built complete frontend: login/register page with validation, board list dashboard with create/delete, kanban board view scoped to boardId, token management with localStorage and 401 redirect. All 13/13 AC met.
